mapper.sql: id, user_id, transaction_type, amount, balance_after, related_id, description, create_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_fund_transaction (user_id, transaction_type, amount, balance_after, related_id, description, create_time, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{transactionType}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{relatedId}, #{description}, NOW(), 0)
